meaning: n.[史](宗教捐税)什一税,什一的教区税,小部分vt.课什一税vi.缴什一税
examples: It's not Christ plus your tithe.
"Ten percent for the tithe box," Mama said and in it went.
If a man redeems any of his tithe, he must add a fifth of the value to it.
He knows his monthly income has gone up because his tithe to his church has risen.
It is moral (a flat-rated tithe is referred to in the Bible's Leviticus) and populist.
